segments.label: WHAT HAPPENED: what five-days-down actually did
segments.vo_script: TO WRITE from the computed study: he just said he trusts regime shifts more than the 5DD pattern — here is what the pattern did, run honestly: 85 signals, 40 fills, plus zero point seven six R average, half won, since 2020 across five liquid names. The data neither crowns nor buries the pattern. Which is rather his point.
segments.editorial_rules: publish whatever it says; the claim-vs-data juxtaposition is the segment
